scripts.build: npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/cli && npm run build -w @mcpjam/chat-ui && npm run build -w @mcpjam/inspector
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/cli && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/design-system && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/chat-ui && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/mcp
scripts.test: npm run check:mcp-v1-runtime-imports && npm run check:platform-runtime-safety && npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run check:platform-runtime-safety:dist && npm run test:parallel && npm run test:packaging -w @mcpjam/sdk
scripts.test:parallel: concurrently -n sdk,cli,design,chatui,inspector,mcp -c blue,green,yellow,white,magenta,cyan --kill-others-on-fail "npm run test -w @mcpjam/sdk" "npm run test -w @mcpjam/cli" "npm run test -w @mcpjam/design-system" "npm run test -w @mcpjam/chat-ui" "npm run test -w @mcpjam/inspector" "npm run test:fast -w @mcpjam/mcp && npm run typecheck:fast -w @mcpjam/mcp"
scripts.test:ordered: npm run test -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run test:packaging -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run test -w @mcpjam/cli && npm run test -w @mcpjam/design-system && npm run test -w @mcpjam/chat-ui && npm run test -w @mcpjam/inspector && npm run test -w @mcpjam/mcp && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/mcp
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:inspector
